3311550.name: Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 9 - Collector's Edition
3311550.description:
Play the newest hidden object game from AVI Games: "Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 9 - Collector's Edition". AviGames presents the seventh game in the hidden object series of "Big Adventure: Trip to Europe". Embark on a journey through beautiful European countries and look for hidden objects in old Europe and Scandinavia, play exciting mini-games and collect souvenirs from different countries.

The collector's edition includes:

- 10 additional locations - find even more objects and a funny raccoon!

- 5 additional new mini-games + 12 more for puzzle lovers

- Beautiful desktop wallpapers

- Music player

- A collection of unique souvenirs

- 20 great souvenirs from the journey
